title: crataegus florifera var. shirleyensis
intro: Crataegus florifera var. shirleyensis, also known as the Shirley hawthorn or Chinese hawthorn, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crataegus florifera var. shirleyensis include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
